title: obione × neomexicana
intro: Obione × neomexicana, also known as a hybrid of the species Obione parryi and Obione drummondiana, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the buckwheat family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its high content of flavonoids and phenolic acids, which have been shown to have antioxidant and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Obione × neomexicana include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and protect against oxidative stress. The plant can be used to make herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
